Installation
============

:link_to_translation:`zh_CN:[中文]`

This guide will help you install the required tools and set up your development environment.

Prerequisites
-------------

Before you begin, ensure you have the following installed:

- Python 3.8 or later
- pip (Python package installer)
- Git

Step 1: Install Dependencies
----------------------------

Install the required Python packages:

.. code-block:: bash

    pip install -r requirements.txt

Step 2: Clone the Repository
----------------------------

Clone the project repository:

.. code-block:: bash

    git clone https://github.com/your-username/your-project.git
    cd your-project

Step 3: Verify Installation
---------------------------

Verify that everything is installed correctly:

.. code-block:: bash

    python -m your_module --version

Next Steps
----------

Now that you have set up your environment, proceed to :doc:`quickstart` to start using the project.
